programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Sampler
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into all kinds of different meats on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a carnivore haven stackin' sandwiches with dynamite duck and a pork trifecta. In Richmond, Va., a taco joint loading up out-of-bounds oxtail.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Beef to Bao
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into dishes from beef to buns. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a funky peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Northern Southern
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing Southern flavour without ever hittin' the South. In Cambridge, Mass., a funky joint fryin' up Nashville hot chicken and cookin' up gangster gumbo. A smokin' spot in Sparks, Nev.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From North To South America
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into flavours that span the Americas. In Charlotte, N.C., he visits a brewery serving the bomb bacon jam burger and a dynamite duck confit flatbread. In Cancun, Mexico, a lights-out spot takes street tacos to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Food, Small Towns
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's stopping in small towns to dig in to big-time eats. In Raymond, N.H., a blow-your-mind butchery loadin' up their burgers and crankin' out scratch-made corn dogs.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Store-Bought is Fine
programme.desc: Store-bought ingredients pass the test for Ina Garten as she makes sweets, treats and more. Ready-made shortcuts wow in her raspberry baked Alaska with fresh raspberry sauce and she takes turkey sandwiches to the next level.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Money-Saving Showstoppers
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is serving a brunch that's easy on the wallet but full of flavour. His straight-from-the-pantry menu features an Italian egg bread bowl, a spinach salad with everything bagel croutons and a lemon caper dill vinaigrette.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: My Delaware Days
programme.desc: Valerie looks back at childhood memories of Delaware and serves up classics from the state like steamed clams with spicy garlic bread, lump crab cakes with cocktail remoulade and sautéed spinach, chocolate peanut butter cakes and apple butter.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Elevate This
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is elevating four mundane, store-bought ingredients. She's turning a ready-made angel food cake into a stunning Baked Alaska, then she's taking a package of cookie dough and conjuring up Fruit Tarts.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 10 Things I Love About Ladd
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is spilling the beans on 10 things she loves about her husband, Ladd, and the food he loves most. There's spatchcock BBQ chicken with apple brown sugar BBQ sauce, and he can't resist thin and crispy waffle fries with sour cream and onion dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Speedy Seafood 4 Ways
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is all about speedy seafood done four ways, and she starts by whipping up snappy coconut shrimp and mango dipping sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easter Weekend
programme.desc: A big Good Friday delivery of Hot Cross Buns to friends. Then on Saturday Ree's making a fabulous spring lunch of Tortellini Primavera for the kids and cute Krispy Eggs to take to the Easter Sunday picnic.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Winter Farming Activities
programme.desc: While Molly Yeh's husband, Nick, and his dad are busy fixing all the farm equipment in the winter off-season, Molly makes comforting sweet flatbreads with lemon yogurt whipped cream for lunch to keep them warm.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Just Me and My Boys
programme.desc: Valerie loves family traditions and decides to creates a new family favorite to celebrate the men in her life.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sunday Supper
programme.desc: After a morning spent in church, Kardea Brown invites her family over for a scrumptiously southern Sunday supper. She serves up a few of her family's favourites for dinner, including fried chicken po' boys and her grandma's crab mac and cheese.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Spring Supper
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis draws on the fresh flavours of spring as she celebrates Easter in Italian style with a fabulous family feast. The holiday menu includes Giada's spicy lamb Bolognese, creamy polenta with spinach, and asparagus with goat cheese.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: Pantry Pulls
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are cooking up delicious recipes using ingredients from their very own pantries, in their very own kitchens. Katie Lee kicks things off with her Pantry Pull Pasta Puttanesca. Jeff Mauro whips up a flavourful Crispy Skin Salmon.

programme.title: In the Kitchen With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, Joanna Gaines brings us into her kitchen as she makes family favourites -- zucchini bread, chocolate chip cookies to name a few. Stick around for a preview of her new cooking show, which will premiere on Magnolia Network.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rockin' New Orleans
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's hitting up funky joints in New Orleans that both locals and tourists are digging into, and they're servin' up all kinds of flavor.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Cruisin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the East Coast, grabbin' delicious dishes at classic joints.

programme.desc: Lois and Peter go on a cruise, leaving Stewie and the family behind. Upset with Lois for leaving him at home, Stewie vows to carry out a diabolical plan. When Brian challenges him to actually do it, Stewie stows away on the ship, finds Lois and kills her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Good Time in Central Africa
programme.desc: When Berta takes a couple of days off, Charlie falls for her replacement. Meanwhile, Alan believes he's being stalked by Lyndsey's ex-husband.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ow, Ow, Don't Stop
programme.desc: Charlie goes on a spending spree for his old fling, Courtney, who shows up after three years in prison for conning him out of money.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Chocolate Diddlers or My Puppy's Dead
programme.desc: Charlie falls into a depression after his break-up with Courtney and goes to see a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lookin' for Japanese Subs
programme.desc: Charlie's obsession with the newly 'married' Rose leads him to stalk her. Meanwhile, Alan grows concerned when Jake and Eldridge start videotaping stupid and extremely dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Darn Priest
programme.desc: Rose uncovers Alan's Ponzi scheme and Alan, in turn, meets 'Manny,' Rose's mannequin 'husband.'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nice to Meet You, Walden Schmidt
programme.desc: Ashton Kutcher joins the cast as Walden Schmidt, an Internet billionaire with a broken heart.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: People Who Love Peepholes
programme.desc: Berta moves into Alan's room as he prepares to leave his Malibu house and Walden enlists Alan's help to confront his ex-wife.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Girls Don't Throw Food
programme.desc: Alan prepares Walden for a date with Bridget, while Jake decides to emulate Walden and drop out of school.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Nine Magic Fingers
programme.desc: Trying to rebound from his recent separation, Walden goes looking for Mrs. Right. Meanwhile, Alan has an opportunity to reconcile with Lyndsey.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Giant Cat Holding a Churro
programme.desc: When Alan struggles to come to terms with Lyndsey's risqué movie past, Walden tries to cheer him up by throwing a party at the house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Squat and the Hover
programme.desc: Walden receives divorce papers from Bridget, but he soon forgets his depression when he meets a girl who looks eerily like her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Those Fancy Japanese Toilets
programme.desc: Jake has a crush on his chemistry tutor, who has a crush on Walden. Meanwhile, Alan obsesses over the journal his brother left him in his will.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thank You for the Intercourse
programme.desc: When Walden begins redecorating the beach house, Alan becomes overly emotional.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Frodo's Headshots
programme.desc: Upon his release from the mental hospital, Alan is met with a slew of challenges that further test his ability to cope.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Fishbowl Full of Glass Eyes
programme.desc: Walden hits if off with a British beauty, but neither of them is sure that he is ready to re-enter the dating world.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: What a Lovely Landing Strip
programme.desc: Walden is trying his best to impress his new love interest when Bridget reappears in his life.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: One False Move, Zimbabwe
programme.desc: Walden's mother visits and Alan becomes smitten with her, even as she reveals a secret about Walden's past that sends him into a downward spiral.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Slowly and in a Circular Fashion
programme.desc: When Walden's ex-wife and mother try to take control of his company, he tries to enlist Alan as an ally.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Possum on Chemo
programme.desc: Zoey tries to coerce Walden into cutting his hair and shaving. Meanwhile, Alan and Lyndsey rekindle their relationship.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Bahamian Rhapsody
programme.desc: After Barb was thrown in jail by immigration during Richard's and New Christine's disastrous wedding, Christine and Matthew head to the Bahamas to try to get her an illegal visa.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Burning Love
programme.desc: Christine and Richard are stunned when they meet up with some old college buddies and realize how much they have aged.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Mole
programme.desc: Christine discovers a suspicious mole but panics when she can't get into a doctor fast enough. Meanwhile, Richard decides he needs to move back in with New Christine.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: For Love or Money

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Caught in a Lie

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Control
programme.desc: Officers Boudreau and Hannett pursue a pair of intoxicated, out of control, teenage dirt bikers. Officer Bronson investigates a night-hunting case involving an animal he's never dealt with. And Officer Lucas gets creative trying to rescue a baby bird.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: Officers Hannett and Boudreau interrogate a group about lighting a fire in the woods. Officers Cheney and McKee confront a sly fisherman with a habit of lying. And officers discover a lobsterman who is banned from state waters breaking the law.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Don't Turkey, Be Happy!
programme.desc: Dr. Emily goes into labour three weeks early.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Storm's a-Mooin'
programme.desc: When a massive flood strikes Michigan, humans and animals alike are reeling from the devastating effects, making it a wet and wild week for the vets.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Fourth of Pol-ly!
programme.desc: From lightning strikes to cat fights, the clinic is seeing a slew of interesting cases.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Mooovin' on Up
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and team rush to get their patients healed before the Isabella County Fair.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon in Outlaw City
programme.desc: The ruins of a lost city in the Caribbean is evidence of a destructive doomsday event that destroyed a wicked city of outlaws, pirates, and sin. New discoveries reveal the secrets of the cataclysm that undid this evil place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey Through Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's greatest engineering projects have been undone by apocalyptic events of chaos and destruction, and today, experts venture into these doomsday sites to investigate what caused their ruin.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Expedition Doomsday
programme.desc: Some of the world's greatest engineering projects have been undone by apocalyptic events of chaos and destruction, and today, experts venture into these doomsday sites to investigate what caused their ruin.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Doomsday at Dragon's Teeth

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Alien Stonehenge
programme.desc: An alien Stonehenge with a sinister purpose, an eerie building filled with strange labyrinths, and an endless concrete track in the middle of nowhere are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Doomsday Town

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.desc: An obsessive video blogger and mother of five shares every detail of her rollercoaster life with her husband and their children online. But one night, intruders tie her up and kidnap her husband and execute him. It seems someone has been keeping secrets.

programme.title: It Happened One Night
programme.desc: Moving can be an exciting opportunity for a fresh start, but for Heather Young, it leads to a chance encounter that results in tragedy.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Get Out
programme.desc: Young love leads fifteen-year old high school standout Jessica Keen down an increasingly rebellious path that culminates in a night of grave and unfathomable terror in rural Madison County, Ohio.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A Killer in the Swamp
programme.desc: A young woman relocates to the marshes of the Ocala National Forest in Florida in search of some peace and a fresh start, but what once appeared to be a remote paradise, soon shows its true colors.

programme.title: A Fatal Confession: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: In 1993, 16-year-old Daniel Villegas confessed to killing two teenagers in El Paso, Texas. He was sentenced to life in prison. Keith investigates to see if Daniel was forced to confess to a shooting he knew nothing about.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Message in Red
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is gunned down in the presence of children, a cryptic message scrawled across the home leads police to suspect the crime may be drug related. The only problem is, there's no evidence the victims had any involvement in the drug trade.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: He'd Do It Again
programme.desc: When the well-liked South Bend native, Tim Moore, seemingly vanishes one cold November night, residents begin to realize they may not know the folks next door as well as they thought.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mom Makes Four
programme.desc: When Carla Fuqua vanishes after a night out with friends, her family panics. She's a dedicated mother who would never leave her son behind. Even worse, Carla has become the fourth missing person in a town of less than 5,000.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Devil Wears Sneakers
programme.desc: A tight-knit Illinois farming town is rocked when a family of five is found beaten to death in their home. When the bodies of the Gee family are discovered, the tiny town of Beason, IL finds itself in the midst of a gruesome murder mystery.

programme.title: Shattered: Seven and a Half Minutes
programme.desc: Mid 1980's. A District Attorney in Wichita Falls, Texas has multiple gruesome homicides to solve. A father's grief provokes him to meet his daughter's killer face to face, and over 100 miles away, a husband is accused of the murder of his wife.

programme.title: Shattered: Cowboy Killer
programme.desc: 2001. An 11-year-old girl makes a gruesome discovery in her own home.. a woman desperate to reach her mother has a sickening feeling something horrible has happened... and a homicide detective is assigned a murder case that will rattle her to her core.

programme.title: Shattered: False Prophet
programme.desc: 1994. Middle River, MD. Christmas Day. A murder rocks a family's Christmas celebration... a mother prepares a holiday dinner for a son who never arrives... and a detective unearths a dark secret that shatters a town's faith.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Good Eats: Every Grain Old Is New Again
programme.desc: Ancient American grains like amaranth, chia and quinoa are making a comeback due to their versatility and nutritional content. Alton Brown shows how to make the most of these very old kitchen newcomers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Honey I Shrunk the Cake
programme.desc: Alton Brown prepares a chiffon cupcake.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Izard Vs. Battes

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Knibb

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Tio
programme.desc: Iron Chef Michael Symon faces off against Challenger Chef Celina Tio. Chef Tio participated in the third season of The Next Iron Chef, for which Iron Chef Symon was a judge. Judges are Anthony Anderson, Karine Bakhoum and Michael Ruhlman.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cohen
programme.desc: New York based Vegetarian Chef Amanda Cohen enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Morimoto. Will her vegetarian delicacies win over the judges, or will Morimoto take home the win?

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Montevideo
programme.desc: Andrew digs into the culinary treasures of Uruguay's capital city, Montevideo. He explores this meaty mecca by highlighting their slow-cooked Asado meats, a thin-sliced steak sandwich called chivito, and breaded and fried beef.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Boston
programme.desc: American history is illustrious in Boston, Massachusetts, and here, Andrew explores its legendary cuisine: from New England clam chowder and scrod to the hotel where Boston cream pie and Parker House rolls were invented.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Athens
programme.desc: Athens is the birthplace of many culinary traditions, and Andrew explores the classics: from stuffed grape leaves and spanakopita to moussaka and real Greek yogurt, still made the way folks have done for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Twin Cities
programme.desc: Walleye, bundt cake, and the Jucy Lucy are on tap for Andrew in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: A Fishy Commission

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Leather-Bound Cake
programme.desc: A cake that looks identical to four, legal-bound volumes for a publishing company; a cake that is the same shape and size of a Shetland pony; a wedding cake specialist creates a cake that is over two foot tall.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fiery, Fairytale Cakes
programme.desc: A waterfront wedding cake gets its own functioning river and an island-themed cake erupts with Polynesian flair. Later, a fairytale Vegas wedding cake is taller than the bride.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Carnivals, Cityscapes and Glowing Cakes

programme.title: Cake Wars: Beauty and the Beast

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy

programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses see a truck intentionally drive over a sleeping man outside a motorcycle gang's clubhouse. During the investigation the witnesses, the truck, and the body disappear, leaving police just one clue: a bloodstain in the snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Ghosted
programme.desc: In a brutal Mexican jungle known to be haunted by Mayan spirits, All-star survivalists Sarah and Trent are tormented by rain, predators and spirits of the rainforest. Then, two strangers try to survive in the crosshairs of Africa's deadliest predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Biting Back at Africa Pt. 1
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A unique tribe of four faces constant threats as they try to survive in a kill zone in Africa. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, they struggle to protect themselves.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Biting Back at Africa Pt. 2
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: A lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. The survivor is part of a unique tribe of four that struggles against constant threats of attack from lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Shaken and Very Stirred
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake in the Philippine jungle rattles a thrill-seeking chef and a competitive hockey mom but lack of food and severe dehydration lead to a disastrous face-first fall. Later, two superfans are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: With extra footage and bonus scenes: Torrential downpours, competing survival styles and a machete accident threaten to send two survivalists home from the Mexican jungle. This is their second chance at success, and they may not be redeemed after all.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Former military man, Chance is paired with an optimistic naturalist, Melissa, in the Amazon Jungle. Humidity, violent storms, caiman, and red-bellied piranha are just some of the threats they face. If they make it to day 21 they're in for a big twist.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Shaken and Very Stirred
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake in the Philippine jungle rattles a thrill-seeking chef and a competitive hockey mom but lack of food and severe dehydration lead to a disastrous face-first fall. Later, two superfans are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stalked on All Sides
programme.desc: Pinned down by Africa's most dangerous threats, elephants, hippos and lions, Kel and Eric work together to avoid becoming prey, but a debilitating injury puts them both at risk. Then, survivalists struggle against threats both natural and supernatural.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Belize Breakdown
programme.desc: On this fan episode of Naked and Afraid, pro surfer Anastasia Ashley, and YouTuber Cory Williams take their shot at surviving Naked and Afraid.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Million Dollar Idea
programme.desc: The Debertis tackle their most ambitious build yet, a transformer truck that will revolutionize the industry. Brad performs in the drift truck and is invited to tryout for a rally cross team.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: More Than Meets the Eye

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Grapevine Automotive
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings loans his time, money and resources to rehab a failing Dallas garage. He and his crew have less than a week to overhaul the shop and teach the owner how to turn a profit.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Westside Hotrods
programme.desc: Richard sees potential in a failing L.A. hot rod shop, and puts in his time, money and resources to turn the shop around.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Scotty's Automotive
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings helps a struggling garage in Roanoke, Texas. Richard and his crew renovate the shop and break the owner of hoarding tendencies in only six days.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Blue Ribbon Automotive
programme.desc: Richard rehabs a certified SMOG shop in Bakersfield, California. Richard and his crew help the owner get back on his feet and research new revenue options in six days.

programme.title: Garage Rehab: Offset Kustoms
programme.desc: Richard and his team rehab a 4x4 shop in New Caney, Texas with renovations and lessons the owners can use to expand their business and become a one-stop shop for off-roading.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: A Precious Chevelle
programme.desc: When JJ surprises Precious with a new '69 Chevelle for her birthday, she jumps in and starts racing right away. Memphis gets a callout from Texas, but when it's time to race, it turns out that they brought some serious hustle, and Doughboy steps it up.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Mid Atlantic Meltdown
programme.desc: The MSO family takes on a group that calls themselves the Mid Atlantic Street Outlaws. They've got some of the nicest cars Memphis has seen in a while, including a doorless dragster. On top of that, they bring some hustle into the racers' meeting.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Small Tire Mountaineers
programme.desc: The entire Memphis family heads up to an air strip in West Virginia for the small tire event of JJ's Arm Drop, with several of the MSO racers switching to small tire to battle it out to see who can take home the $15,000 prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Arm Drop In Appalachia
programme.desc: JJ and the Memphis family are gearing up for the big tire event of JJ's Arm Drop in West Virginia. Everyone learned from the small tire event that the asphalt on this former airstrip is sketchy, especially in the right lane.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Appalachian Accidents
programme.desc: The big tire event of JJ's Arm Drop in West Virginia continues into round two with 13 MSO racers working to take out the remaining non-MSO racers. If somebody from the Memphis family can make it to the end and take home the $25,000, the whole family wins.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Hotheads and Hotrods

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mom on the Farm
programme.desc: Molly's mom is visiting on the weekend, so she cooks a supper with all her mom's favourite dishes, starting with chicken paprikash. For sides she makes spatzle and zucchini with walnut pesto and dessert is her cute stuffed challah hedgehogs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Brunch All Day
programme.desc: Molly is having a brunch party with a few of her former bridesmaids. She makes blueberry blintzes, a breakfast salad with soft cooked eggs and crispy walnut sausage patties.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's Trombone Choir
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a hearty tomato squash soup and labneh grilled cheese for lunch before husband Nick's trombone practice. Then she sends him off with chewy chocolate peanut butter bars for the whole choir.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Chinese Family Favorites
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making some of her favourite Chinese-inspired recipes, including some passed down from her dad's family. He's flying in with Molly's Aunt Lucy to visit her and baby Bernie, so Molly makes them her grandma's sweet and sour tepong pork.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Happy Passover!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts Passover dinner on the farm, putting her own twist on some of her family's traditional recipes. She starts with an Asian-inspired scallion and ginger matzo ball soup.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Spring Is Springing!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh creates a springtime feast to celebrate planting season on the farm. The meal includes her juicy one-skillet chicken with spring vegetables, crispy dill flakey bread, and a nutty walnut romesco sauce for dunking.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Hawaii Farm'O
programme.desc: Molly Yeh hosts a tiki party game night with all her favourite Hawaiian-inspired foods. She prepares delicious Hurricane Popcorn Balls, Sweet and Salty Pork Musubi, a mouth-watering Macaroni Salad and creamy Macadamia Nut Pops for dessert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Prince Fielder's Big Hit

programme.title: Movie: Rings
programme.desc: Julia becomes worried about her boyfriend when he explores the dark urban legend surrounding a video that is said to kill the watcher in seven days. She sacrifices herself to save him and must solve the mystery of the movie before the curse takes her.

programme.desc: Newt Scamander reaches New York at the end of his journey researching magical creatures in 1926. When a Muggle accidentally lets some of his creatures loose, Newt is forced to team up with an Auror to recapture the beasts amid rising tensions in the city.

programme.title: Home Town: Countryside in the City
programme.desc: A couple is ready for a different pace after living in the country for years. They're hoping to find a historic home that lets them hold onto the countryside with a spacious garden. Ben and Erin show them two very different options.

programme.title: Home Town: The Move of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Robyn and Cassidy want to move Robyn's great-grandmother's house to a new plot of land, but Ben and Erin are sceptical that the home could survive the move.

programme.title: Home Town: Bachelor's Paradise
programme.desc: After years of travelling, a bachelor is ready to buy a home where his family has lived for five generations. Ben and Erin find a cottage with good resale potential, and their design includes a stunning master bedroom and a quaint front porch.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Aloha Florida
programme.desc: A woman follows a job from Hawaii to Florida, but it comes with one massive challenge: she has to start in two weeks. She and her husband have one weekend to find the perfect home for their multi-generational family.

programme.title: House in a Hurry: Big Choices in San Antonio
programme.desc: A man learns he must report for duty in six weeks, not six months, pushing him and his wife to quickly settle on a house in San Antonio. They find two good options, but the house hunt comes to a halt when she can't decide what's best for the family.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: Renovating a Time Capsule
programme.desc: The co-founder of a non-profit that inspires at-risk youth has fallen on hard times due to health complications. Jesse, the designers and volunteers surprise his family by renovating their 1970s-style home into a mid-century modern masterpiece.

programme.title: Extreme Makeover: Home Edition - Behind the Bus: For Home and Country

programme.title: Mexico Untamed: Hunt and Seek
programme.desc: Travelers from afar are drawn to Mexico for its rich ecology.

programme.title: Extreme Alaska
programme.desc: There's a living Eden in the wilderness of Alaska called Denali. Follow a year in this land crowned by the highest mountain in North America, as grizzly bears, wolves and moose struggle to thrive and survive.

programme.title: Florida Untamed: Gator Country
programme.desc: Following three juvenile gators on a fight for survival as they work to outmanoeuvre their abundant foe in a distressing game of life or death.

programme.title: Big Sur: Wild California
programme.desc: California's Big Sur coast is famously breathtaking, but few know that it is a brutal, untamed world battles for survival are constantly being fought.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Land of Fire
programme.desc: Explore the fiery heart of Hawaii, from volcanic eruptions to spiders that smile, fish that climb and turtles that bury secrets in a landscape that defies expectations.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii: Secrets of the Deep
programme.desc: Where the shores end, the real story begins. Head to the wet and wild Hawaii, with undersea rivers and creatures that can thrive and survive only in this location.

programme.title: Wild Bahamas: Enchanted Seas
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest natural habitats in the world lie past the sandy beaches of the Bahamans. This is home to many remarkable species.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Under the Volcano
programme.desc: The most active volcanoes in the Lower 48 are concealed by the High Cascades' snowy crests.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Rise of the Redwood Giants
programme.desc: Discover the land of giants, where the tallest trees in the world tower over the Californian coast.

programme.title: The Mighty Northwest: Glacier Land
programme.desc: Discover the ice-carved valleys, steep slopes, and hidden lakes of America's glacier lands.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Legend of the Turin Shroud
programme.desc: The Turin Shroud is believed to be the burial cloth of Jesus and proof of his existence, but skeptics disagree. Experts investigate this ancient relic to determine if the shroud is genuine, or one of the most elaborate hoaxes in history.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Aliens Submerged
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: New World Secrets
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mass Grave Under Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: Detectives hunt down a dangerous woman on the run after she slashed a former friend in the face with a box cutter.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: A twice convicted and particularly dangerous pedophile and sexual predator from Georgia is pursued before he hurts someone again.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: The Bronx Boys
programme.desc: Two friends from the South Bronx go on a crime spree that is increasingly more violent with each offence.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Last Dance

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Unthinkable
programme.desc: Officers search for a sex offender on the run, and aim to find him before sunrise.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: We Are Nightwatch Nation
programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle from Yonkers, New York, go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient who's had a hard time being taken seriously in the past. Far away in Austin, Texas, Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Charles 'Chip' Huth and Kansas City SWAT head out on a high-stakes drug-warrant. The team will make simultaneous hits on two locations in the same apartment complex.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: SWAT team negotiator Jake Byas faces the toughest challenge of his career: dealing with an armed murder suspect barricaded on a ledge who's threatening to kill himself and anyone who tries to get him down; another team surrounds the home of a drug dealer.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend erupts when SWAT is called in to subdue a home intruder, whose startling method of entry leaves the team scratching their heads. An alleged heroin dealer is scoped out by an officer who's on a mission to put him out of business.

programme.title: Shattered: The Box
programme.desc: 1996. A father in Texas seeks revenge for the savage dismemberment of his son... a girl in Mississippi desperately tries to escape the metal footlocker she has been imprisoned in... and a rookie detective is assigned a case that will define his career.

programme.title: Shattered: Do You Know My Voice?
programme.desc: Linda Hardin is convinced Grant is the perfect husband. In 2017, when he's arrested for murder, Linda believes police have the wrong man. Then officers show up at her door with evidence of another crime and her devotion is put to the test.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Fear
programme.desc: The body of a 74-year-old woman is found bludgeoned to death, the gruesome discovery sends shockwaves across the community. Suspicion and paranoia take control. Then a young girl vanishes, and her case exposes sordid secrets hidden for decades.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When Valerie Tieman goes missing her parents Allen and Sarajean begin to worry. Valerie's body is later found buried in the woods behind the home she shares with husband Luc.

programme.title: Harvey Weinstein: ID Breaking Now
programme.desc: He threatened, he bullied, he spied on them but Harvey Weinstein could not silence the women he raped and assaulted. Harvey Weinstein: ID Breaking Now interviews Weinstein's spy and exposes the story Weinstein hoped would never be told.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Wished My Son Were Dead
programme.desc: It has been more than 25 years, yet Joyce Alexander is still terrified of her son, William Patrick Alexander. She fears he holds her responsible for his horrifying crime, and is convinced he is plotting his revenge from prison.

programme.title: Raw Terror: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When Valerie Tieman goes missing her parents Allen and Sarajean begin to worry. Valerie's body is later found buried in the woods behind the home she shares with husband Luc.

programme.title: Harvey Weinstein: ID Breaking Now
programme.desc: He threatened, he bullied, he spied on them but Harvey Weinstein could not silence the women he raped and assaulted. Harvey Weinstein: ID Breaking Now interviews Weinstein's spy and exposes the story Weinstein hoped would never be told.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Trail of Fear
programme.desc: The body of a 74-year-old woman is found bludgeoned to death, the gruesome discovery sends shockwaves across the community. Suspicion and paranoia take control. Then a young girl vanishes, and her case exposes sordid secrets hidden for decades.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Hero Betrayed
programme.desc: When a hero firefighter is found savagely murdered in his own home, the trail of evidence police find takes them on a twisting and tension filled journey to justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Hidden Clue
programme.desc: Will a hidden clue be the key to solving the vicious murder of a young woman?

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Pack Mentality
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and he becomes the owner of over fifty dogs. Accusations become threats, threats become attacks, and eventually the conflict comes to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Cock-a-Doodle-Dead
programme.desc: A homeowner hopes the renters who move into the house beside him will be much better behaved than the previous tenants. When he determines they're not, the stage is set for bloody conflict and a shocking act of violence that threatens to claim many lives.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Houseknives
programme.desc: Two families with several children between them get along famously until one of the mothers starts to dictate to the other how she should be raising her kids. Battle lines are drawn, violence flares, and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Final Notice
programme.desc: What do you do when you fear for your life and the person at the end of the 911 line is the one you need protecting from? Two Altadena families are unlucky enough to find out when an LAPD cop moves in next door.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Fireworks on Fury Lane
programme.desc: A firefighter moves into a family-friendly neighbourhood with his wife and child, but the rambunctious teens living next door drive him over the edge.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Screaming Oaks
programme.desc: An army vet goes out of his way to make his neighbors feel welcome, but when a child's birthday gift goes missing; it only takes 37 days for the friendships to end in a killing spree.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Black Widow
programme.desc: When Cindy Taylor was a teen, her world was shattered by the sudden death of her father. Police said it was a heart attack, but years later Cindy would discover her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding from her.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: 9/11: The Falling Man: 9/11: The Falling Man
programme.desc: The story of the unforgettable photograph of a 9/11 'jumper.' It follows the trail of the photographer who nearly lost his life shooting the image and a journalist who committed himself to uncovering the falling man's identity.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Blackout Killers
programme.desc: Two serial killers take advantage of the blackouts in Nazi Germany and Britain that were meant to defend against enemy bombing.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Outdoor Racing Room
programme.desc: Matt turns stock car fans’ boring back yard into an entertaining space inspired by their love of racing, complete with checkerboard floor mats, race car seating, a fire pit and more.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Rustic Vinyl Lounge
programme.desc: Music lovers get a rustic vinyl lounge complete with a vinyl record bar countertop.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Hawaiian Paradise
programme.desc: These homeowners are desperate to overhaul their terribly overgrown messy back yard. They want a space with a Hawaiian vibe where they can cook and dine among tropical foliage.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Contemporary Bi-Level Patio
programme.desc: Denae and her husband want a contemporary usable space to eat dinner, cook and relax. Chris delivers with a sleek design that includes a wood overlay for the lower patio, a tile overlay for the upper patio, a fireplace and lounge seating.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Woodsy Hideaway
programme.desc: These homeowners love the great outdoors. Chris delivered their love to them, which includes a large family style dining table with redwood stumps for chairs, a beautiful stone water feature and a concrete patio with colorful lush plants.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Yard Crashers Visits Blog Cabin in Central Florida
programme.desc: Chris and team head to Blog Cabin in Central Florida to transform the spacious backyard property into a relaxing and entertaining hang out.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Funky Food and Music Lounge
programme.desc: David and Kiki want a place to play music and share food and cocktails with friends. Inspired by Austin's eclectic and funky scene, Chris designs an outdoor room with a lounge area and an outdoor bar.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Traditional Country Deck
programme.desc: This small unusable deck is going big Texas style. Chris and his crew deliver in a big way by transforming a dead zone of a deck into a functional outdoor dining area with a custom prep station bar all on a new massive cedar deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Boise Boys: An Odd Couple of Homes
programme.desc: The odd couple of real estate looks to break even on an investment property in Boise, ID.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Mexico
programme.desc: The frontier spirit can still be found in New Mexico even when it comes to the food.

programme.title: Inside Bundesliga: The Bundesliga Dino
programme.desc: The remarkable story of one of Germany's most successful clubs. How Hamburg SV emerged as a Bundesliga powerhouse, and later European champions, before being forced to battle for survival.

programme.title: Bundesliga Top 11: Goalkeepers of the '90s
programme.desc: A countdown of the top Bundesliga goalkeepers in the decade of the '90s. How the likes of Oliver Kahn and Andreas Kopke, with their shot-stopping heroics, etched their names in German soccer history.

programme.title: Bundesliga Legends: The Football Rebel
programme.desc: A profile of one of the Bundesliga's most colourful figures. Never afraid to express his opinion, Ewald Lienen left an indelible mark, both in his time as a player, and during his days on the bench.

programme.title: My Season: Dortmund's First Title Under Klopp
programme.desc: Revisit Borussia Dortmund's title-winning 2010-11 campaign. How Jurgen Klopp conquered the Bundesliga with an exciting brand of soccer that captured the hearts of Dortmund’s passionate fans.

programme.title: Bundesliga Legends: Karl-Heinz Rummenigge
programme.desc: A look back at the legendary career of Karl-Heinze Rummenigge. One of Germany's greatest players, Rummenigge starred for Bayern Munich on the field, before emerging as a powerful figure at the club.

programme.title: Bundesliga Top 11: Defenders of the '90s
programme.desc: A countdown of the top Bundesliga defenders of the '90s. How the likes of Jurgen Kohler and Guido Buchwald, with their commanding presence at the back, etched their names in German soccer history.

programme.title: My Season: The Werder Double
programme.desc: Revisit Werder Bremen's title-winning 1992-93 campaign. How a side managed by Otto Rehhagel rose to the top of the Bundesliga, the crowning achievement in a triumphant era at the club.

programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are still reeling from the news that the landlord wants them out of 113th in 30 days. Ceaser decides to do everything in his power to save the shop. Meanwhile, Donna has an uncomfortable chat with Tati, and Walt hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Living Single: What's Next

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend

programme.title: Movie: Hearts of Spring

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Audit
programme.desc: Dorothy is stunned to learn that Stan's tax problems are her tax problems since Stan is being audited for a number of years when they were still married. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose take a Spanish class, each for different reasons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Artist
programme.desc: Dorothy, Blanche and Rose all agree to pose for the Hungarian sculptor Laszlo.
