programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Tainted Obligation
programme.desc: When Meredith and Lexie's father, Thatcher, returns to the hospital with a failed liver, it's up to Meredith to save his life. Meanwhile, Izzie empathizes with a patient riddled with tumours.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Invasion
programme.desc: The residents of Seattle Grace and Mercy West vie for surgeries and their careers as day one of the hospital merger begins. Meanwhile, Arizona stands by an enraged Callie when her father employs a priest to help convince her to date men.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Saw What I Saw
programme.desc: After a burn victim unexpectedly dies in the midst of a chaotic ER, the Chief and board member Jennings interrogate the residents to find the culprit, as all the Mercy West and Seattle Grace residents defend their actions in an effort to save their jobs.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Give Peace a Chance
programme.desc: When Isaac, a hospital lab tech, has an inoperable tumour wrapped around his spine, he turns to Dr. Shepherd to do the impossible. Derek tests the Chief's authority when Richard objects to moving forward with the risky surgery.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Invest in Love
programme.desc: Arizona goes into surgery knowing that a $25 million donation to the hospital and a 10-year-old boy's life are all on the line. Meanwhile, Christina tests her boundaries with Owen and Alex is left to contend with all of Izzie's hospital bills.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: New History
programme.desc: When Owen recruits a woman from his past, Dr. Teddy Altman, as the new cardiothoracic surgeon, Christina questions their prior relationship and Dr. Altman's qualification. Meanwhile, the stress Richard feel takes its toll and Izzy returns to Seattle Grace

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Holidaze
programme.desc: Miranda is visited by her father who disapproves of her choices, Mark and Lexie must cope with the shocking arrival of a woman from Mark's past when she visits and Thatcher Grey questions the Chief's recent behaviour as Meredith comes to his defence.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Blink
programme.desc: Mark flies Addison to Seattle to help with a difficult procedure on his pregnant daughter. Owen questions Teddy's motives when she assigns Cristina as the lead on a complicated surgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.desc: The iconic Mustang is off to the races when Team Galpin builds a '72 Mach-1 resto-mod to meet NASCAR superstar Joey Logano's need for speed. Meanwhile, Beau makes a pit stop at SEMA to deliver a 2019 GT and gets taken for a spin in the Burn Yard.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Vintage Payday
programme.desc: Richard races toward a vintage payday by restoring his '37 Buick Racer back to its Indy 500 roots. Meanwhile, the guys buy a one-owner '77 Blazer that could fetch them double their money. Later, a surprise birthday gift has Richard feeling nostalgic.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: The Memphis Tea Party
programme.desc: JJ gets a callout from Chris Bromley and his Fox-Body Mustang drivers from Massachusetts. Chelsea is excited to race her new car and Molly is out for redemption but technical difficulties make it hard for the MSO to prove they can outrun any Mustang.

programme.title: Driven: The Resto-MACH 22
programme.desc: The iconic Mustang is off to the races when Team Galpin builds a '72 Mach-1 resto-mod to meet NASCAR superstar Joey Logano's need for speed. Meanwhile, Beau makes a pit stop at SEMA to deliver a 2019 GT and gets taken for a spin in the Burn Yard.

programme.desc: Jesse James faces off with Jessi Combs.

programme.title: Brake Room: Jesse James vs James Pumphrey
programme.desc: Motor world talent goes head-to-head in viral video competition to test their motor knowledge and win the 'mystery box.'

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Tough Inheritance
programme.desc: As winter intensifies, Sean faces an engine room fire. Summer Bay deck boss suffers a season-threatening injury. Harley offers a newfound nephew a trial run at greenhorn. Monte races to fill Wizard's Bairdi quota so Keith can say farewell to their father.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Josh and Casey risk a 500 mile trek north to the icy Russian line. Jake tracks his own fast-moving crab horde. Sig does double duty on the Northwestern. The Bering sea cracks the Wizard's 74 year-old steel hull as the Colburns face the loss of their dad.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Curse of the Russian Line
programme.desc: Josh and Casey haul their all time biggest pots, starting a gold rush to the Russian line. Cpt. Bill gets inside intel, while Harley confirms numbers his own way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: The wrath of Arctic Storm Elsa hits the Cornelia hardest as a breakaway pot thrashes Josh and Casey's crew. Captain Keith orders deckhands onto the stack as Elsa's icy blasts threaten to capsize the Wizard. No rest for Jake as the Saga takes a rogue wave.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sixty Foot Monster
programme.desc: As arctic superstorm Elsa intensifies, a rare forecast warns of isolated waves of unusual size. Trapped in the crab-rich northern grounds, the Cornelia Marie, Wizard and Southern Wind haul pots as big as the waves, until one boat faces a 60 foot monster.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Crane Wreck
programme.desc: In storm-driven seas, Cornelia Marie's crane goes off the rails, smashing Josh and Casey's wheelhouse and injuring deckhand Taylor. Sig risks navigating a rocky passage in treacherous conditions, and the Wizard crew face a rogue wave without warning.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Devil's Cut
programme.desc: Deckhands pay in blood as captains make up for time lost to the storm. On the Cornelia Marie Josh takes the wheel as Casey conducts surgery at sea. Brenna A tests the mettle of a former Marine. And a call from home has Sig facing a worst case scenario.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unbreakable
programme.desc: The fleet battles a freight train of back to back storms. Sig's crew pays a price for stuffed pots, while Harley risks gear on an elusive hoard under the ice. Freddy attempts self-surgery on the Wizard, and the Summer Bay crew gets news on Nick's future.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: Monte returns to co-captain the Wizard just as a freight train of storms slams the fleet from the south. Jake battles the risk of hauling pots in 30 foot seas to return to his family. Wild Bill drives farther north into the icy Arctic than any other boat.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Old-School Captains
programme.desc: Casey and Josh reflect on how crab fishing differs from fishing in Hawaii. Crab fishing veterans can form unlikely alliances, but trust does not come easy for old school captains. Freddy paid a price for Keith's decision to haul in intense seas.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Nightmare at Sea
programme.desc: Casey and Josh talk about the perils of crab fishing and what fishing is like in Hawaii. The Colburns faced a dark ship nightmare when smoke filled the Wizard. Towering breakers shattered Jake's steel anchor.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: What Are Your Intentions?

programme.desc: It's a sweet wake-up call when Scott Conant challenges four chefs to make breakfast-themed desserts. The baskets are full of reminders of the most-important meal of the day, including a coffee drink, a cleverly designed candy and waffle dough.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Carnival Crunch Time
programme.desc: It's a wild ride as Scott Conant challenges four chefs to create colorful, carnival-themed desserts for the judges, while also bringing their personalities to the table.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Sixty-Dollar Butter
programme.desc: Four chefs roll the dice on something sandwiched at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nev. The parking lot goes overseas to Italy before going all in on an indulgent dessert, and one chef's shopper hits the jackpot when they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Sweet Gamble
programme.desc: It's a high-stakes stakeout at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nevada, as the chefs gamble with unsuspecting shoppers' carts to create the best nacho platter. The final two chefs gamble for a sweet and salty win.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Some Like It Spicy
programme.desc: Alex kicks of the season with four chefs staking out customers at Fry's Marketplace in Phoenix. One chef must go after cooking breakfast to go, and the parking lot heats up something spicy. The judges decide who has the guiltiest pleasure.

programme.title: Chopped: Epic Burgers!
programme.desc: The chefs battle it out to see who can build the most epic burger masterpieces. An awe-inspiring tower kicks off the first round of hamburger hustling. An old-school lunchbox favourite adds a bite of yummy, kitschy fun to the entree round.

programme.title: Chopped: Gold Medal Games: Frying
programme.desc: In this gripping heat, four famous fry masters compete to see which elite competitor will move on to the $50,000 Gold Medal Games finale. The first basket comes packed with a fun fair treat and a gamey meat.

programme.title: Chopped: Gold Medal Games: Grilling
programme.desc: Four renowned chefs battle to prove why grilling is a winter "sport" worth cheering for, but only one can advance to the $50,000 Grand Finale.

programme.title: Chopped: Gold Medal Games: Fast!
programme.desc: Chefs use premade dough and a Persian hot dog stew in the appetizer round, must tackle a prized seafood and floral in the entree and find beets and a classic French dessert in their final basket.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Trouble on Copper Island
programme.desc: Eivin and August feel the heat when building a new hay baler for the homestead. Otto and Charlotte embark on an adventure to celebrate 25 years of marriage, while Jane and Atz Lee quest to find protein on Copper island.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Welcome Back to the Homestead
programme.desc: Eivin and Eve journey through Kilcher road to transport a massive barn back to their home. Jewel and her son return and receive a surprise from Atz Sr., while August is busy building an outrageous outhouse for the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Tangled Trouble
programme.desc: Atz Lee and Eivin run into trouble when helping family during a haul on the Alaskan waterways. Jane and Atz Lee pass on family fishing secrets to the next generation, while Eve tames the newest member of the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Backcountry Christmas
programme.desc: As unseasonably warm conditions hit the homestead, the Kilchers venture to the backcountry for a white Christmas celebration.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Fishy Waters
programme.desc: Eivin and Eve undergo a risky cleanup mission as they rescue fish tangled by nets in a nearby river. Charlotte and Otto rebuild their rotting deck, Atz Sr. embarks on a solo moose hunt and Jane and Jewel help around the homestead.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: On the Prowl
programme.desc: As Etienne ventures on his first big game hunt, August joins Eivin for the first time to prowl for winter meat. Meanwhile, Atz Sr. and Otto prepare and preserve part of Kilcher history and attempt to reassemble a nearby barn.

programme.title: Raising Wild: Into the Wild
programme.desc: To unplug from the modern world, Brett Hines moves his family from the suburbs to the untamed wilderness of central Washington. Setting up their new home in a race against winter, they come face to face with their first off-grid hurdle: predators.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Nature's Wrath
programme.desc: Several of the Kilchers are out on fishing excursions with varying degrees of success. One group is trying out a new technique that may not pay off and another runs into one of Alaska's deadliest natural occurrences.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Frontiersgiving
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving with the Kilchers, but the work never stops. In order to enjoy the holiday, they'll need to repair a lengthy fence system, fix their water source and even devise their own frontier style refrigerator from scratch.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Getting any big projects done on the frontier means you need big equipment, but transporting equipment is a dangerous task unto itself.

programme.title: Raising Wild: Into the Wild
programme.desc: To unplug from the modern world, Brett Hines moves his family from the suburbs to the untamed wilderness of central Washington. Setting up their new home in a race against winter, they come face to face with their first off-grid hurdle: predators.

programme.title: Tanked!: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: A fish-feeding problem turns into an all-day affair, a tank on hydraulics gives a new business a lift and makes waves with a hidden engagement ring, and the owner of a free standing 1950s diner gives some heavy demands for a tank to match the decor.

programme.title: Tanked!: Gangster Tank
programme.desc: The Mob Museum makes Wayde and Brett an offer they can't refuse. They want a tank with replica sunken rumrunner for their prohibition exhibit and speakeasy in downtown Las Vegas.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fernando Vargas's Knockout Tank
programme.desc: Three-time world champion boxer Fernando Vargas asks Wayde and Brett to make a boxing-glove shaped tank for his boxing gym in Las Vegas. But this challenge goes well beyond the ring.

programme.title: Tanked!: Bill Engvall: Here's Your Tank!
programme.desc: Comedian Bill Engvall requests a Zen-like fish tank for his new office in Hollywood but some firm weight restrictions throw a wrench in their plans. In Vegas, the guys build a tank with fish, lizards and even insects for the home of Penn Jillette.

programme.title: Tanked!: Penn and Teller Monkey Magic
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett drop in on world famous magicians, Penn and Teller who want a tank built in honor of their 40th anniversary together. This double-sided tank will reside in their quirky backstage Monkey Room.

programme.title: Tanked!: Jeff Dunham's Tank for Dummies
programme.desc: Ventriloquist Jeff Dunham wants a theatre-themed tank starring his characters Peanut, Walter and Achmed. The addition of a submerged chandelier gets challenging when Jeff insists it light up.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Under Construction
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan has the biggest idea of all. Tracy wants to be able to swim with his massive 6 ft sharks, so he wants the guys to tank his entire pool house. Meanwhile, a local car dealership needs a new tank in their showroom to make a big splash.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Revealed
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan is still waiting for his shark tank. The pressure is on Wayde and Brett to convert his entire poolhouse into a massive 14,000 gallon aquarium. Winter is approaching and extra care is taken while transporting Tracy's beloved sharks.

programme.title: Tanked!: Gabriel Iglesias' Fluffy Tank

programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: The Undercover Princess Mystery / Mystery at the Fashion Show
programme.desc: Mira goes undercover to find the precious gem of Jalpur. Then, when a dress that Priya made for a fashion show goes missing, Mira discovers that it's hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Bad Ear Day
Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Copycat
programme.desc: When Cat Noir becomes a burglary suspect, Ladybug must prove his innocence. With a copycat version of Cat Noir prowling around Paris, however, Ladybug is hard-pressed to tell the difference between her partner and the imposter.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Timebreaker
programme.desc: After Alix's friends break her father’s priceless watch, she is akumatized into Timebreaker.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricketsitter/ Backflip Bill
programme.desc: Bill takes Gramma to a doctor’s checkup and leaves Tilly in charge of Cricket. Cricket learns that Bill never realized his childhood dream of becoming a gymnast.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Welcome Home/ Raccooned
programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Bearer of Dad News
programme.desc: When Raven has a vision of Booker and Nia being upset over their Dad's move, she goes overboard trying to do all of the fun activities Devon normally did with the kids.

programme.title: Raven's Home: You're Gonna Get It
programme.desc: When Nia sneaks to school wearing makeup against Raven's wishes, she draws the attention of the 8th grade girls who invite her to hang out.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Luke Out Below
programme.desc: Luke returns to camp and decides to take Griff and Zuri on an adventure to prove that he can be just as responsible as the other CITs.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Queen of Screams
programme.desc: Jorge enters a short story contest and wins a dinner with his favorite horror novelist, Stephanie Queen, and decides to bring along a few of his fellow campers for the thrilling experience. Meanwhile, Xander must act as referee between Emma and Ravi.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Tidal Wave
programme.desc: Zuri helps Xander create a music video for his song 'Tidal Wave' in the hopes of turning him into a social media star.

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?
programme.desc: To the kids' dismay, Jessie has everyone take the subway to the cultural fair at Emma's school. Meanwhile, Bertram and Ravi look for a pesky spider that has made its home in the apartment.

programme.title: Jessie: Are You Cooler Than a 5th Grader?
programme.desc: Jessie teaches Zuri the value of a dollar when, against the wishes of Mrs. Chesterfield, they set up a lemonade stand in the lobby of their building.

programme.title: Jessie: Romancing the Crone
programme.desc: Jessie and the kids must think of a creative way to retrieve the tiara Jessie dropped on Mrs. Chesterfield's terrace when she refuses to give it back. They decide to ask Bertram to ask her on a date so they can recover Mrs. Ross' tiara.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Impopstar/ Football Camp
programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Killer Caller
programme.desc: Twin Cities, MN, police are hunting for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness. No one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.title: Killing Versace: The Hunt for a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The headline grabbing murder of fashion icon Gianni Versace sent detectives into a tireless chase for a serial killer. Now expert insights on the mind of Andrew Cunanan, and a deep dive by forensic and legal specialists.

programme.title: Dahmer on Dahmer: A Serial Killer Speaks
programme.desc: Dive into the mind of America's most notorious serial killer, Jeffrey Dahmer. With new revelations and never-before-seen interviews, the series sheds light on the grizzly and complicated investigation through the eyes of pivotal figures in the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: Aileen Wuornos
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the complexities of the case against the woman branded as America’s first female serial killer. Questions still revolve around her claim of self-defense and whether or not she got the justice she deserved.

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Sam Little
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Beth Karas follows Sam Little, America's most prolific serial killer who confessed to murdering over 90 women in 17 states, in hopes to identify how he got away with murder for so long.

programme.title: Snapped: Notorious: The BTK Serial Killer
programme.desc: Self-named killer B.T.K., murdered 10 people over 17 years all while taunting Wichita police and media before being exposed as family man and churchgoer, Dennis Rader. In an exclusively acquired interview, he reveals what drove him to do it.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: F.P.S.
programme.desc: Violent computer games are blamed when a young woman is found strangled to death.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Mad Hops
programme.desc: Detectives Goren and Bishop search the courts for a missing high school basketball player.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Unrequited
programme.desc: An anonymous letter leads to the exhumation of an elderly man whom, it is discovered, has been poisoned.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Haunting
programme.desc: Police believed a pair of double homicides in Nebraska, five years apart, might be connected. Investigators working to solve the crimes feared the killer might strike again.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Alex Henriquez
programme.desc: After finding the body of 10-year-old Jessica Guzman, police connected a series of murders to Alex Henriquez-a successful businessman, who was later sentenced to 75 years in prison. Henriquez maintains his innocence in this meeting with Piers Morgan.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Bernard Giles
programme.desc: Piers Morgan sits down with Bernard Giles, a convicted serial killer who is willing to admit to his heinous crimes, and asks what motivated the man to commit those brutal acts.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Mark Riebe
programme.desc: Piers Morgan enters Florida’s maximum security Blackwater River Correctional Facility to confront Mark Riebe, a convicted killer who has since confessed multiple times to the abduction and murder of thirteen women along Florida’s Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Serial Killer With Piers Morgan: Lorenzo Gilyard
programme.desc: At Missouri's Crossroads Correctional Facility, Piers Morgan comes face to face with Lorenzo Gilyard-the Kansas City Strangler, and sets out to discover what drove this soft-spoken, seemingly ordinary man to kill multiple times over seventeen years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Good & Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at a trash facility, a detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know she will come face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery On Blood Mountain
programme.desc: It started with a frightening horror flick from the '80s. Then decades later, it was happening for real. Four people were dead and investigators believed they were chasing a serial killer.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss
programme.desc: A wealthy business mogul is sent to prison for insider trading, and upon her release, she's broke, homeless and hated by almost everyone. She turns to her assistant in her time of need in hopes of re-establishing her wealth and changing her ways.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Chief of Hearts
programme.desc: Homer is completing his court-ordered community service when he befriends his supervisor, Chief Wiggum, by offering him a sandwich. Touched by the act of kindness, Wiggum assigns the other convicts unpleasant tasks, but allows Homer to join him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Bob Next Door
programme.desc: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour, Walt, is his archenemy Sideshow Bob disguised and back for revenge. But when Marge tries to convince Bart otherwise by taking him to visit the state penitentiary, a disturbing truth is revealed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Judge Me Tender
programme.desc: When Moe discovers a hidden talent for judging contests, he is approached by a television agent to join the 'American Idol' judges' panel. Moe flies to Los Angeles where he tours the Fox lot and receives some sage career advice.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: When Krusty the Clown is announced as the recipient of the Nobel Peace Prize, Homer invites Bart to accompany him on a trip to Oslo for the ceremony. Sensing that Lisa would feel left out, Marge surprises her with a retreat at performing arts camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Loan-a-Lisa
programme.desc: Grampa gives each member of the family a portion of his savings. Lisa invests in Nelson's new business venture, but realizes that his instant success might lure him away from the classroom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: MoneyBart
programme.desc: A visit by a Springfield Elementary alum-turned-Ivy-League student pushes Lisa to question her own go-getter attitude and re-evaluate the scope of her extracurricular activities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Simpson, This Isn't Your Life
programme.desc: When the Simpsons visit Marge's childhood home and discover a box of her old belongings, Lisa is surprised to learn that Marge was once a stellar A+ student. Meanwhile, Bart puts Nelson and his bullying ways in place and claims the title of School Bully.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: When a pigeon flies through the Simpsons' home and suffers a broken wing, Bart makes it his duty to care for the bird and nurse it back to health. When the pigeon is ready to fly, Homer decides to enter it in a bird race.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Donnie Fatso
programme.desc: Homer spends New Year's Eve in the Springfield Penitentiary after getting caught bribing an official. An FBI investigator offers to reduce his jail time if Homer agrees to go undercover as an informant to investigate Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moms I'd Like to Forget
programme.desc: During a game of dodgeball, Bart discovers that a classmate has the same scar on his hand that he does. Puzzled by the matching blemishes, he asks Marge about it, who explains that she and her girlfriends formed 'The Cool Moms' club years earlier.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flaming Moe
programme.desc: When Smithers offers to help transform Moe's dingy pub into a more refined and trendy lounge, the revamped Mo's quickly becomes Springfield's local gay hangout.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Extreme: Home Makeover
programme.desc: To make their own dreams come true, the gang gives an unlucky family a home makeover.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Nightman Cometh
programme.desc: Charlie, with the help of the rest of the gang, stages a rock opera based on his song 'Nightman.'

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Exploits the Mortgage Crisis
programme.desc: While Frank, Mac and Dennis try their hand at real estate, Dee arranges to be a surrogate mother to a wealthy couple with a sweet house. All the while, Charlie faces off with a lawyer on the intricacies of the judicial system.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Hits the Road
programme.desc: The gang attempts to expand their horizons by taking a road trip to the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Solar Systems
programme.desc: Since the first discovery of a planet orbiting another star, some 280 alien solar systems have been identified. It's only by looking at solar systems far beyond our own, that we can understand how remarkable our universe is.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The universe is constantly expanding and so is our understanding of it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Invasion
programme.desc: A swarm of small spacecraft depart their huge mother ship, and hover in our atmosphere.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Message
programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.title: Alien Planet Earths
programme.desc: The search for Earth's twin is the hottest topic in astronomy. Thanks to NASA's ground-breaking Kepler mission, astronomers believe there are over 20 billion alien worlds with liquid water and therefore the potential for life.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: What to Expect
programme.desc: Aliens exist. Scientists lay out what we can expect them to be like by grappling with difficult questions.

programme.title: Aliens: The Definitive Guide: How to Prepare
programme.desc: Inject a dose of cutting-edge research into an action-packed journey through space, to find out exactly whether aliens might come here, and how to prepare when they arrive.This everything you need to know; it's the definitive guide.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: Secrets of the Space Force
programme.desc: Newly declassified documents reveal that the US Space Force is the culmination of decades of top-secret military programs to weaponize the cosmos, and special access exposes the cutting-edge weapons and sci-fi defense systems behind real-life star wars.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: American UFOs
programme.desc: A top-secret aviation program funded by a mysterious money trail could have built a plane that can travel nearly 4,000 miles an hour; a former CIA operative investigates how these superplanes will revolutionize flight and unleash a new lethal technology.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: US Navy vs. the Triangle
programme.desc: New discoveries might finally explain the truth behind one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances, when 306 US Navy crewmen vanished in the Triangle without a trace.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Witchcraft in the Devil's Triangle
programme.desc: A new lead might finally solve the mystery of the Witchcraft, one of the strangest disappearances on record in the Bermuda Triangle. A cutting-edge expedition leads experts to a shocking discovery on the ocean floor.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Mystery of the Teleporting Shipwreck
programme.desc: When a credible witness claims to have discovered the wreckage of a long-lost ship, experts launch an investigation to positively identify the missing vessel and uncover how it could be more than 10 miles from where it reportedly sank.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Monster in the Abyss
programme.desc: A team of experts are hot on the trail of the legendary sea monster that's reported to live in the underwater caves of the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and witness testimony, they dive into these chambers to hunt for the deadly beast.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Sr. Corporal Steve Claggett and other SWAT members practice their explosive breaching skills. Then, Steve rushes to the scene of an armed barricade where two suspects have allegedly robbed a convenience store.

programme.title: The Big House: Maze Prison
programme.desc: The Maze Prison held Catholic and Protestant prisoners, along with paramilitary groups.

programme.title: The Big House: Maine State Prison
programme.desc: Many changes have occurred in Maine State Prison since its opening in 1824.

programme.title: The Big House: Angola
programme.desc: Angola is a brutal maximum-security prison known as the 'Bloodiest Prison in America.' Most of the facility's 5,000 inmates will never see the outside world again.

programme.title: The Big House: Attica Prison
programme.desc: This prison was hailed as a model for the confinement of the most dangerous criminals.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: The Big House: Montana State Prison
programme.desc: Today, the state prison in Deer Lodge, Montana operates as both a ranch and a modern high-security prison but its legacy is dark and its history is marked by violent uprisings.

programme.title: American Justice: A Questionable Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Naramore was convicted of attempting to murder a 78-year-old terminally ill woman.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Dark Side of the City
programme.desc: For the men and women on the Nightwatch, two things never stop: the calls and the questions. The first responders do everything they can to save the victims of several shootings, a drug overdose and more.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Not Today
programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Animal Instinct
programme.desc: Two officers are helped by the K9 Unit to corral a suspect who takes off running after a car chase. Rush and Rutledge struggle to convince a man with heart problems to go to the hospital. A car careens off a bridge and the driver can't be found.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: DUI's and Don'ts
programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: It Was All Judith
programme.desc: When Corey Breininger was a child, his stepmother, Judith Hawkey, coerced him into doing something horrible. Tormented by guilt, he kept her deadly secret for years. Knowing what she was capable of, he wasn't sure he could tell the truth and live.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: The Happy Face Killer: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: As Melissa Moore grew older, the admiration she had for her father Keith Jesperson, was replaced by fear. Her most horrific revelation would be learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: Betrayed: One Way Ticket Out
programme.desc: When lifelong Long Islander Donna Bocklet announces she's leaving for Florida, it sends shock waves through her close circle of friends and family that ends in her brutal murder.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Million Dollar Murder
programme.desc: When businessman George Kogan is gunned down in broad daylight on a ritzy Upper East Side sidewalk, investigators must untangle a web of lies to figure out who wanted the millionaire dead... and how far they were willing to go to make it happen.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Last Call at the Falls
programme.desc: When the nude body of a beautiful young woman is found wrapped in a blanket on the side of a desolate East New York parkway, investigators find themselves in a race against the clock to find her psychotic killer before he strikes again.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Dark Side
programme.desc: These women aren't afraid to take a walk on the dark side.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Obsession
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Anger Mismanagement
programme.desc: The match is struck, the fuse is lit, and it's only a matter of time before the 'Anger Mismanagement' of these Deadly Women will see them explode.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Vulnerable
programme.desc: A secret addiction drives a young woman to sacrifice her wheelchair bound employer; a scheming caregiver betrays the man who trusts her; and a single mother's desire for a better life leads to a brutal dismemberment.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: Love is usually a game for two -- when three try to play, somebody will lose out. An obsessed wife fixates on revenge, a lustful affair breeds a wicked plot, and a wealthy housewife hides more than skeletons in her closet.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Have and to Kill
programme.desc: When some brides vowed to love and honor their husbands, they lied. These Deadly Women made a mockery of marital commitment. They only promised 'To Have and To Kill.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A beautiful face can mask the ugliest of intentions.

programme.title: American Monster: Appalachian Horror Film
programme.desc: Brian and Randi Trimble are in the throes of newly married life. But when Brian meets the fun-loving Blaine Norris at work, their friendship over Blaine's low-budget horror film takes a dark turn.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: American Monster: Into the Swamp
programme.desc: At a family-run construction company, brothers and cousins work hard together - and play even harder. But when one of them vanishes, no one has answers. The mystery of his disappearance - and the salacious betrayal behind it - isn't solved for 20 years.

programme.title: American Monster: A Mother's Work
programme.desc: Never-before-seen home movies reveal the fabulous lifestyle of Lanny and Donna Horwitz raising their only son Radley in their Florida mansion. But when their lives are upended by a ghastly shooting, everyone in this eccentric family becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Goering's Greed
programme.desc: Billions of dollars of art and treasure was stolen by the second most powerful figure in Nazi Germany. The team search for items stolen from Holland, including sunken treasure and lost masterpieces.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession
programme.desc: Hitler's desire to acquire the largest art collection in the world led to the theft of numerous rare art treasures throughout Europe. The team delves into how these mass thefts were orchestrated. Also, an astounding discovery is made.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Stolen gold was the fuel of the Nazi War industry. The team looks into the quantity looted and where it's believed to have ended up. The chilling story of a Canadian Commando and gold taken at Auschwitz is revealed.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: The Mystery of Rommel's Gold
programme.desc: In 1943, the Nazis looted $50 million in gold from the Jewish community in Djerba, Tunisia. The team tracks the loot to a dive site off Corsica, a pawn shop in Germany, and the family of an escaped Nazi in South America.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Hitler's Obsession

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth

programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain
programme.desc: Lucas heads west to Bountiful, UT to build a dream backyard on the side of a mountain. Faced with many challenges, Lucas creates a Tuscan themed pool complete with a spa, the biggest linear fire wall he's ever built and a grotto with a 23,000 pound lid.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Earth Block Ranch
programme.desc: A family builds thousands of earth blocks while withstanding winter monsoons, freezing temperatures and more to finish their San Antonio forever home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Grillers in the Mist
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to New York for the Long Island Fun Fest and some Empire State eats. He can't resist a pizza covered in gooey penne alla vodka or a fancy Hamptons Dog, and he also tries the ultimate Italian-American combo, a Cannoli Calzone.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Cincinnati, OH
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Cincinnati to see if he can take down an enormous eight-pound, double-crusted pizza in just thirty minutes. Along the way, he encounters one beautiful cheeseburger at a 200-year-old bar and a massive tray of Cincy-style chili.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.title: Good Eats: Let Them Eat (Icebox) Cake
programme.desc: Alton resuscitates the languishing tradition of the 'icebox' or 'refrigerator' cake. These no-bake cakes were all the rage in the 1950s, but they’re ready for a pastry redux.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Waffle Truth
programme.desc: Alton teaches us how to build a better batter for waffles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Egg Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: For Whom The Cheese Melts: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" his classic fondue show with some cheesy science and a completely new recipe, because he really didn't like the first one that much anyway. The Lady of the Refrigerator returns and boy, is she mad!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Feast of the Middle East

programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.
